title: [MTR4] STB Trains Pack
description: New trains for Minecraft Transit Railway of the fictional railway company STB
body:
# Français 🇫🇷
Ce pack de texture est un pack de train destiné au mod [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) en version 4.0.0 minimum

Il représente la compagnie de train fictive STB, à utiliser pour sublimer toutes vos lignes de trains qui utilisent le mod MTR !

Ce pack utilise des modèles et des textures créés par d'autres créateurs de la communauté MTR :
- STB BER 3 C-Train : [Singapore MRT NSEWL Trains 4-Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/singapore-mrt-nsewl-trains-4-pack) fait par [NonPlayerCharacter](https://modrinth.com/user/NonPlayerCharacter)
- Toutes les Variantes du MF26 : [Singapore MRT NSEWL Trains 4-Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/singapore-mrt-nsewl-trains-4-pack) fait par [NonPlayerCharacter](https://modrinth.com/user/NonPlayerCharacter)
- VDL Citea STB Bus : [[MTR4] VDL Citea LLE-120](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vdl-citea-lle-120?version=1.20.4) fait par [szandorthe13th](https://modrinth.com/user/szandorthe13th)

Ce pack est utilisé sur le serveur minecraft : MTR France Server - Discord : [https://discord.gg/PHYnk84S](https://discord.gg/PHYnk84S)

### Il est recommandé d'aussi utiliser le pack d'icones [STB Icons Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stb-icons-pack)

# English 🇬🇧
This texture pack is a train pack designed for the [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod, version 4.0.0 or later

It represents the fictional railway company STB, designed to enhance all your train routes that use the MTR mod!

This pack uses models and textures created by other creators in the MTR community:
- STB BER 3 C-Train: [Singapore MRT NSEWL Trains 4-Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/singapore-mrt-nsewl-trains-4-pack) by [NonPlayerCharacter](https://modrinth.com/user/NonPlayerCharacter)
- All MF26 variants: [Singapore MRT NSEWL Trains 4-Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/singapore-mrt-nsewl-trains-4-pack) by [NonPlayerCharacter](https://modrinth.com/user/NonPlayerCharacter)
- VDL Citea STB Bus: [[MTR4] VDL Citea LLE-120](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vdl-citea-lle-120?version=1.20.4) by [szandorthe13th](https://modrinth.com/user/szandorthe13th)

This pack is used on the Minecraft server: MTR France Server - Discord : [https://discord.gg/PHYnk84S](https://discord.gg/PHYnk84S)

### We also recommend using the [STB Icons Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stb-icons-pack)
